reasoning: Koren, this session is designed to address your primary limiter: the 9.3% power drop from 5 to 20 minutes, indicating poor lactate clearance and an underdeveloped aerobic base. Given your extended rest, we'll ease into intensity. As you make frequent efforts on Emigration Canyon, applying these strategies will directly support your Alpine Loop climb goal.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 8x (4 min at 218W, 1 min at 242W), focus on controlled breathing and form. 2 min recovery between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
